== Notes for [[Item:Q105312|Q105312]] ==


--------------------
=== GEDCOM Source ===

@@R903599084@@ Mexico, Select Church Records, 1537-1966 Ancestry.com Ancestry.com Operations, Inc. 1,61089::0
=== GEDCOM Source ===
1,61089::158963489

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000011266776893

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
